chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8757 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.36667/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Hyder Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate for the respondent No.3. Mr. Fawad Chand, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the respondent. Per learned counsel, finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition and he seeks that assessment be finalized by the respondent department after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
